summary: Phase 20 build complete + all GSD gates passed. EVL-01 RAN 2026-07-21 (user-approved): forward recall 92% (11/12; T9 house-idiom fired 1/3, the sole miss), forward specificity 100% (12/12), reciprocal lz-tpp 100% quiet, lz-refactor 100% quiet; every forward chunk canary-validated. D-09 tuning then RAN (user-approved): widened the house-idiom clause of the lz-red description, validated on an INDEPENDENT held-out set (recall 5/6->6/6, specificity 6/6 held, unbiased number-blind review PASS, 1233 chars under cap) -- APPLIED to plugins/lz-tdd/skills/lz-red/SKILL.md and made live via /reload-plugins. All recorded in .claude/skills/lz-red-workspace/EVAL-RESULTS.md. This handoff is for a FRESH session to run the ONLY remaining empirical requirement: the EVL-02 behavior benchmark (heavy, orchestrator-driven). Then milestone close. Nothing metered runs without explicit user approval (D-11).

completed_tasks.name: EVL-01 trigger-eval harness build (vendored rig + three-way boundary + data)
EVL-02 RED-behavior grader build (grade-run.mjs D-05-RUBRIC + 10 scenarios)
Finalize: EVAL-RESULTS.md scaffold + battery GREEN + gated command set + HALT
EVL-01 forward+reciprocal RAN (user-approved): recall 92% (T9 miss 1/3), specificity 100%, reciprocal lz-tpp+lz-refactor 100% quiet; canary-validated. Filled EVAL-RESULTS.md.
D-09 house-idiom description widen (user-approved): held-out A/B recall 5/6->6/6 + specificity 6/6 held, unbiased review PASS, 1233 chars. APPLIED to lz-red SKILL.md.
/reload-plugins run by the user 2026-07-21 -- the D-09-widened lz-red description is now live in-session.

remaining_tasks.name: EVL-02 behavior benchmark (ORCHESTRATOR-driven; needs its OWN fresh explicit user approval before any claude -p). Set: .claude/skills/lz-red-workspace/evals/evals.json (10 RED scenarios ids 0-9). Fan out UNNAMED fire-and-forget subagents per scenario x config (with_skill|no_skill) x run (>=3) in ISOLATED scratch cwds; WAIT for ALL completion notifications before grading (timing arrives only at completion); node grade-run.mjs -> grading.preliminary.json; installed skill-creator LLM judge resolves EXACTLY 2 dims (right-next-test; behavior-not-implementation) -> judge-verdicts.json; node merge-judge.mjs --merge then --verify iteration-1 (non-zero = do NOT aggregate); python -m scripts.aggregate_benchmark iteration-1 --skill-name lz-red -> benchmark + passk-metrics; fill EVAL-RESULTS.md EVL-02 tables + Pass@k/Pass^k + >=1 unbiased-from-scratch reviewer.

AFTER EVL-02: /gsd-complete-milestone (Phase 20 is the LAST phase of lz-tdd@0.0.3). If EVL-02 is skipped, the milestone audit will note EVL-02 as a Pending validation-record gap (non-fatal, VIT-02 precedent).

blockers.description: EVL-02 metered RUN requires explicit user approval before executing (D-11 HARD GATE / eval-run-approval-gate). Not technical -- a mandatory human decision gate.
blockers.workaround: Ready-to-run sequence is in .claude/skills/lz-red-workspace/EVAL-RESULTS.md under 'How to run (GATED)' step (EVL-02 behavior). Present it and WAIT; defer is valid.

human_actions_pending.action: Approve (or defer) the metered EVL-02 behavior benchmark run before any claude -p / subagent fan-out.
human_actions_pending.context: EVL-02 is the last empirical requirement; it is a large spend (10 scenarios x 2 configs x >=3 runs = 60+ coach subagents + an LLM judge + an unbiased reviewer). A fresh session with headroom is the right place for it.

decisions.decision: EVL-01 recorded at recall 92% and NOT re-run after the D-09 widen.
decisions.rationale: D-09 rule forbids self-feeding re-eval loops; the held-out A/B is the tuning gate. So the EVL-01 forward table stays the honest PRE-widen measurement; the D-09 section carries the widen's held-out validation.

decisions.decision: D-09 house-idiom widen ACCEPTED and shipped.
decisions.rationale: Beat the current description on an independent held-out set (recall 5/6->6/6) with zero specificity regression (6/6 negatives quiet in both arms), under the char cap, unbiased number-blind review PASS.
EVL-02 is not yet measured (gated); gsd-verifier confirmed Pending is the honest state. VIT-02 precedent.

next_action: Present the EVL-02 behavior-benchmark run to the user and WAIT for an explicit go-ahead (D-11). Do NOT spawn any subagent or run claude -p until approved. On approval, drive EVL-02 as the ORCHESTRATOR (the gsd-executor cannot spawn subagents): fan out UNNAMED fire-and-forget subagents per scenario (evals/evals.json ids 0-9) x config (with_skill|no_skill) x run (>=3) in isolated scratch cwds; WAIT for ALL completion notifications before grading; grade-run.mjs -> LLM judge (exactly 2 dims) -> merge-judge --merge -> merge-judge --verify iteration-1 -> aggregate_benchmark -> Pass@k/Pass^k; fill EVAL-RESULTS.md EVL-02 tables + reserved unbiased-reviewer slot. Then /gsd-complete-milestone.
context_notes: Env + pitfalls for the fresh session: (1) Harness is native-fixed and vendored at .claude/skills/lz-red-workspace/tools/skill-creator-eval; run_eval reads the skill-path's SKILL.md live; --strict-mcp-config + --setting-sources project are baked in. (2) Windows/native node: pass Windows paths (D:/...) to python args, NOT git-bash /d/... paths (a /d/... path resolves to D:\d\...). (3) num-workers 1, PONYTAIL_DEFAULT_MODE=off, model claude-opus-4-8, 3 runs. (4) Recall is throttle-SENSITIVE (canary-gate it); specificity is throttle-ROBUST. (5) eval02-subagent-orchestration-mechanic: subagents UNNAMED fire-and-forget, isolated scratch cwd per run = ground-truth drive; timing ONLY at completion notification -- WAIT for ALL before grading, do not poll/grade early. (6) merge-judge --verify BEFORE aggregate (a scored-only run is a silent false pass otherwise). (7) unbiased-review-beats-primed: >=1 from-scratch reviewer over grader source + sample transcripts + numbers, number-blind. (8) Hygiene scans: watch the naive-email-regex false-positive on lz-tdd@X.Y.Z version tokens; verify committer identity is the public gmail before committing. (9) Raw eval outputs are git-ignored (trigger-results-d07-*, reciprocal-lz-*, heldout-d09-*, evals/d07-chunks/*-chunk-*, iteration-*/); the tracked evidence is EVAL-RESULTS.md + evals/*.json inputs. (10) Throwaway runner + summarizer scripts from this session live in the session scratchpad, not the repo.
